results.rendered_html: upahastikā [upagatā hastaṃ ata itvam] A small purse (or box) containing the ingredients necessary for betel-chewing (e. g. leaves, chunam, catechu, betel &c.) (Mar. caṃcī, baṭavā, jhoḻaṇā); upahastikāyāstāṃbūlaṃ karpūsahitamuddhatya  Dk. 116.
